'''鈭歞h-v-m''' ('''kadhavam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanoimprint|nanoimprint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanoimprint|nanoimprint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-v-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadhavam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhavam|thidhavam]] || [[word:jidhavam|jidhavam]] || [[word:shidhavam|shidhavam]] || [[word:kidhavam|kidhavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhavam|thuthudhavam]] || [[word:jujudhavam|jujudhavam]] || [[word:shushudhavam|shushudhavam]] || [[word:kukudhavam|kukudhavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhavam|thudhavam]] || [[word:judhavam|judhavam]] || [[word:shudhavam|shudhavam]] || [[word:kudhavam|kudhavam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhavam|thudhavam]] || [[word:judhavam|judhavam]] || [[word:shudhavam|shudhavam]] || [[word:kudhavam|kudhavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhavam|thedhavam]] || [[word:jedhavam|jedhavam]] || [[word:shedhavam|shedhavam]] || [[word:kedhavam|kedhavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhavam|thothodhavam]] || [[word:jojodhavam|jojodhavam]] || [[word:shoshodhavam|shoshodhavam]] || [[word:kokodhavam|kokodhavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhavam|thodhavam]] || [[word:jodhavam|jodhavam]] || [[word:shodhavam|shodhavam]] || [[word:kodhavam|kodhavam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhavam|thodhavam]] || [[word:jodhavam|jodhavam]] || [[word:shodhavam|shodhavam]] || [[word:kodhavam|kodhavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]] || [[word:dhavam|dhavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhavam|th忙dhavam]] || [[word:j忙dhavam|j忙dhavam]] || [[word:sh忙dhavam|sh忙dhavam]] || [[word:k忙dhavam|k忙dhavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhavam|thathadhavam]] || [[word:jajadhavam|jajadhavam]] || [[word:shashadhavam|shashadhavam]] || [[word:kakadhavam|kakadhavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhavam|thadhavam]] || [[word:jadhavam|jadhavam]] || [[word:shadhavam|shadhavam]] || [[word:kadhavam|kadhavam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhavam|thadhavam]] || [[word:jadhavam|jadhavam]] || [[word:shadhavam|shadhavam]] || [[word:kadhavam|kadhavam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhavam|shadhavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhavam|goshadhavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhavam|gokishadhavam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhavamn眉|shadhavamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkn眉|goshadhavamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavamn眉|gokishadhavamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhavamsh毛|shadhavamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhavamnksh毛|goshadhavamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhavamsh毛|gokishadhavamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavamro|shadhavamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkro|goshadhavamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavamro|gokishadhavamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavammu|shadhavammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkmu|goshadhavamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavammu|gokishadhavammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhavamsher|shadhavamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhavamnksher|goshadhavamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhavamsher|gokishadhavamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhavamng|shadhavamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkng|goshadhavamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhavamng|gokishadhavamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhavamya|shadhavamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkya|goshadhavamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhavamya|gokishadhavamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhavamyam|shadhavamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkyam|goshadhavamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhavamyam|gokishadhavamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhavamn眉sh毛|shadhavamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkn眉sh毛|goshadhavamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhavamn眉sh毛|gokishadhavamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavamn眉ro|shadhavamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkn眉ro|goshadhavamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavamn眉ro|gokishadhavamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavamn眉mu|shadhavamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkn眉mu|goshadhavamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavamn眉mu|gokishadhavamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhavamsh毛n眉|shadhavamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavamnksh毛n眉|goshadhavamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavamsh毛n眉|gokishadhavamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavamsh毛ro|shadhavamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavamnksh毛ro|goshadhavamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavamsh毛ro|gokishadhavamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavamsh毛mu|shadhavamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavamnksh毛mu|goshadhavamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavamsh毛mu|gokishadhavamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhavamron眉|shadhavamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkron眉|goshadhavamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavamron眉|gokishadhavamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhavamrosh毛|shadhavamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkrosh毛|goshadhavamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhavamrosh毛|gokishadhavamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhavamromu|shadhavamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkromu|goshadhavamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhavamromu|gokishadhavamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhavammun眉|shadhavammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkmun眉|goshadhavamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhavammun眉|gokishadhavammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhavammush毛|shadhavammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkmush毛|goshadhavamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhavammush毛|gokishadhavammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhavammuro|shadhavammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhavamnkmuro|goshadhavamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhavammuro|gokishadhavammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
